headings: IV. Insurance Policy Deductibles and Self-Insured Retentions.
text: (collectively, the 'Deductible Contributions') are an indemnity obligation on the part  of  the  Involved  Party;  it  is  a  contractual  allocation  of  the  p arties'  mutual obligations under the Contract Documents.  The Deductible Contributions may be assessed against any Involved Party by Owner, in its sole discretion, and, to the extent  assessed,  shall  be  in  amounts  that  bear  a  reasonable  and  proportionate relationship to the alleged liability, loss, or damage.
